title: Mihuco's Modpack
description: The all-in-one modpack for everything without changing the vanilla experience.
body:
# 🌟 Everything, just way better
I put this pack together because I wanted a Minecraft experience that improves basically every single part of the game without losing that classic "Vanilla+" feel.

It started as a personal project so I wouldn't have to spend hours tweaking settings every time I wanted to play, but it turned out so well I figured I’d share it. It’s got everything: it runs like a dream, looks beautiful, and fixes a ton of those tiny "standard" Minecraft headaches.

Here’s the breakdown of what's inside:

## 🚀 No more lag 
I’ve made sure this runs as smoothly as possible, whether you’re on a gaming beast or a literal potato:

- **The Holy Trinity:** Powered by Sodium and Lithium, plus FerriteCore and EntityCulling. Basically: high FPS and very low RAM usage.

- **Infinite Horizons:** With Voxy and Voxy World Gen V2, you can see for miles without your GPU catching fire.

- **Fast & Stable:** Chunks load instantly and the menus won't freeze up on you, thanks to Dynamic FPS.

## ✨ Looks Awesome
The world feels way more alive now, and you don’t even have to touch a config file:

- **In-game Browser:** Thanks to Resourcify, you can browse and download resource packs and shaders directly from the game menu. No more Alt-Tabbing to your browser!

- **Smooth Management:** Packed Packs keeps all those textures and data packs working perfectly together without you having to lift a finger.
  
- **Shader Support:** Iris is built-in. Just drop in your favorite shaders and you're good to go.

- **Immersive Details:** Cool new player animations (NotEnoughAnimations), bushier grass (BetterGrassify) and physical rain (Particle Rain).

- **Dynamic Lights:** Torches and glowing items actually light up the area while you’re holding them or when they're on the ground (LambDynamicLights). It’s a total game-changer for caving.

## 🛠️ Quality of Life
This is where you’ll notice the biggest difference in daily gameplay. Honestly, most of this should be in the base game by now:

- **Useful Info:** AppleSkin shows you exactly how much food heals, and Status Effect Bars keeps your potion timers clear.

- **Easy Inventory:** Sorting is a breeze with Mouse Tweaks, and you can peek inside Shulker Boxes without placing them (Simple Shulker Preview).
  
- **Better Chat:** ChatPlus make the chat way more modern and fun to use. It’s just... cleaner.

- **Less Frustration:** XP orbs clump together to stop lag (Clumps), and if you kick the bucket, Death Finder helps you find exactly where you left your loot.

## 🏗️ For the Builders & Tech Nerds
If you spend your time on mega-builds or complex redstone farms, I’ve got you covered:

- **The Heavy Hitters:** Includes Axiom, WorldEdit, and Litematica for all your blueprint and massive building needs.

- **Tech Tweaks:** Carpet Mod is there if you want to mess with game rules or test farm mechanics deeply.

- **Freecam:** A "fake" spectator mode (LegacyFreecam) that’s perfect for checking on your farms or getting the perfect screenshot angle.

## 🌐 Multiplayer & Social
If you’re playing on servers, you’re going to love this:

- **Voice Chat:** Built-in proximity chat (Simple Voice Chat). Talking to people in-game makes everything 10x more fun.

- **Connect Anywhere:** ViaFabricPlus lets you join servers even if they aren't on the exact same version as the pack.
  
- **Host with ease:** Want to play with a friend but don't want to pay for a server? Remotely makes setting up and joining servers way easier and more direct.

- **Crash Protection:** Mods like Not Enough Crashes mean that if a mod acts up, the game won't just vanish—it’ll kick you back to the main menu with a report so you can keep playing.

And more mods that improve the experience by 500%.


<details>
<summary>Anticheats</summary>

Some servers may block you for having certain mods considered cheating due to inventory or camera restrictions; make sure to disable them to avoid problems.

</details>
